title: PRMP vs SAGEConv Benchmark on RelBench rel-avito (ad-ctr & user-visits)
summary: Demo notebook benchmarking Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) against SAGEConv on the RelBench rel-avito dataset. It computes cross-table R² diagnostics across all 11 foreign-key links, ranks links by cardinality × predictability, generates linear baseline and PRMP residual predictions, and visualizes R² scores, cardinality, and their product via bar charts. The mini data JSON contains per-FK-link metadata (cardinality, parent/child tables) and sampled feature rows for reproducible offline exploration.
